creator: croyle@gelemna.ft-wayne.in.us
text:
Minor updates:  I forgot to strip the binary, and as long as I was
fixing that decided to clear up a typo in the Imakefile.

Apply the following patch to
ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/bugsx.tar.gz or pick up the
updated tarball at http://www.infonex.com/~dacroyle/ports/bugsx.tar.gz
